Title: Ihyô o tsuita kôgeki!! Chôrô no nerai wa sukautâ
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Ryûsei Nakao
Plot: As Son Goku trains on his ship, Son Gohan and Kuririn watch as Freeza and his henchmen Zarbon and Dodoria, interrogate a group of Namekkuseijin about the Dragon Ball, and another group of Namekku Senshi show up to stand against them.
